recommendations.description: Add independent discovery for describe_budgets, then chain dependent discoveries with for_each and params. All parameter-dependent discoveries are missing required AccountId, BudgetName, ActionId parameters.
recommendations.impact: Fixes parameter validation errors, enables proper discovery chain

recommendations.description: Fix field paths in conditions to match emit structure. Remove Actions., Notifications., Budgets. wrappers - fields are emitted directly.
recommendations.impact: Fixes field path errors, enables correct condition evaluation

recommendations.description: Use list methods (describe_budgets, describe_budget_actions_for_budget) instead of singular methods (describe_budget, describe_budget_action) for initial discovery.
recommendations.impact: Enables proper resource enumeration before detailed checks

recommendations.description: Add items_for to emit sections for APIs that return lists (Notifications[], Budgets[]).
recommendations.impact: Enables proper iteration over list responses

validation_issues: All 4 rules have discovery chain issues - missing for_each and params
All 4 rules have field path mismatches - conditions don't match emit structure
3 rules use wrong discovery methods - should use list methods first
2 rules need items_for for list responses

api_structure.describe_budgets: Returns Budgets[] - needs items_for, only requires AccountId
api_structure.describe_budget: Returns single Budget - requires AccountId + BudgetName
api_structure.describe_budget_actions_for_budget: Returns Actions[] - needs items_for, requires AccountId + BudgetName
api_structure.describe_budget_action: Returns single Action - requires AccountId + BudgetName + ActionId
api_structure.describe_notifications_for_budget: Returns Notifications[] - needs items_for, requires AccountId + BudgetName

issues: All discoveries missing required parameters (AccountId, BudgetName, ActionId)
All field paths incorrect - don't match emit structure
Wrong discovery methods used (singular instead of plural)

warnings: describe_budget_action: Missing required parameter AccountId, BudgetName, ActionId (4 occurrences)
describe_notifications_for_budget: Missing required parameter AccountId, BudgetName (4 occurrences)
describe_budget: Missing required parameter AccountId, BudgetName (4 occurrences)
test_results.note: 4 checks found (likely from describe_budgets working), but 12 parameter validation errors for dependent discoveries

issues: Missing discovery chain - describe_budget_action requires AccountId, BudgetName, ActionId
Wrong field path: item.Actions.Subscribers should be item.Subscribers
Wrong discovery method: should use describe_budget_actions_for_budget to list actions first
aws.budgets.budget.alert_destinations_co.recommendation: Add independent describe_budgets discovery, chain describe_budget_actions_for_budget, fix field paths

issues: Missing discovery chain - describe_notifications_for_budget requires AccountId, BudgetName
Wrong field paths: item.Notifications.Threshold/NotificationType should be item.Threshold/NotificationType
Missing items_for: API returns Notifications[] list, need items_for to iterate
aws.budgets.budget.alert_thresholds_conf.recommendation: Add for_each from describe_budgets, add params, add items_for, fix field paths

issues: Wrong discovery method: should use describe_budgets (lists all) instead of describe_budget (single)
Wrong field paths: item.Budgets.BudgetName/BudgetLimit should be item.BudgetName/BudgetLimit
Missing items_for: API returns Budgets[] list, need items_for to iterate
aws.budgets.budget.budgets_s_defined_for.recommendation: Change to describe_budgets, add items_for, fix field paths

issues: Missing discovery chain - describe_budget_action requires AccountId, BudgetName, ActionId
Wrong field paths: item.Actions.ExecutionRoleArn/ApprovalModel should be item.ExecutionRoleArn/ApprovalModel
Wrong discovery method: should use describe_budget_actions_for_budget to list actions first
aws.budgets.budget.modify_permissions_re.recommendation: Add independent describe_budgets discovery, chain describe_budget_actions_for_budget, fix field paths
